wlong_drive.caption: {'scene_content_description': 'A glossy red sedan drives steadily along the right-hand lane of a busy downtown street in warm late-afternoon sunlight, and a cyclist in a bright blue jacket pedals smoothly alongside it in the marked bike lane, holding an even pace just to the left of the car. Sunlight glances off the red hood and roofline of the sedan while the spokes of the bicycle catch brief flashes of light as they turn. The pair passes a row of small storefronts with glass display windows, striped awnings, and hand-lettered signboards, where several pedestrians stroll past with shopping bags in hand. The red paintwork of the sedan reflects the passing facades in smooth streaks, and the blue sleeve of the cyclist ripples slightly in the moving air. Long shadows from lampposts and parked cars stretch diagonally across the asphalt, and the low sun gives every surface a warm amber cast. Farther down the block, a delivery van waits at the curb with its hazard lights blinking slowly, and the street tapers toward a distant intersection where a traffic signal hangs over the lanes.', 'camera_movement_description': 'The camera trucks smoothly alongside the sedan at eye level, matching the pace of traffic in a medium wide shot that keeps the car and the cyclist together in the frame; the tracking is steady and stabilized, with no visible shake or zoom.'}
wlong_drive.edit: {'scene_content_description': 'A glossy blue sedan drives steadily along the right-hand lane of a busy downtown street in warm late-afternoon sunlight, and a cyclist in a bright blue jacket pedals smoothly alongside it in the marked bike lane, holding an even pace just to the left of the car. wlong_drive.kind: W3 long, bound attributes on two moving subjects (red sedan + blue cyclist); flip: red sedan -> blue sedan
wlong_drive.check: sedan stays RED, cyclist jacket stays BLUE (no swap/bleed/desaturation); storefront street intact

wlong_kitchen.caption: {'scene_content_description': 'Inside a warmly lit professional kitchen, a chef in a crisp white apron stands at a stainless-steel counter, carefully plating a finished dish on a round white plate. He lifts a pinch of green herb garnish with his fingertips and sprinkles it slowly over the sauced centerpiece, and the small green herb flecks settle gradually across the glossy surface of the food. Thin ribbons of steam rise steadily from a saucepan behind him, curling upward through the beam of an overhead lamp. A row of polished copper pans hangs from a rack above the counter, their burnished surfaces reflecting the warm light in soft amber highlights. To the right of the chef, a younger cook wipes the rim of a second plate with a folded cloth, moving in quick, precise strokes. Several small prep bowls of chopped ingredients, a squeeze bottle of pale sauce, and a folded gray towel sit scattered across the counter. The chef leans in closely over the plate, adjusts one element with metal tweezers, and straightens up slowly, steam still drifting between him and the hanging copper pans.', 'camera_movement_description': 'Starting from a medium shot at eye level, the camera dollies in slowly toward the plate on the counter, easing into a medium close up; the push-in is smooth and continuous, ending with a slight downward tilt that holds the finished dish in the lower center of the frame.'}
wlong_kitchen.edit: {'scene_content_description': 'Inside a warmly lit professional kitchen, a chef in a crisp white apron stands at a stainless-steel counter, carefully plating a finished dish on a round white plate. He lifts a pinch of red chili garnish with his fingertips and sprinkles it slowly over the sauced centerpiece, and the small red chili flecks settle gradually across the glossy surface of the food. Thin ribbons of steam rise steadily from a saucepan behind him, curling upward through the beam of an overhead lamp. A row of polished copper pans hangs from a rack above the counter, their burnished surfaces reflecting the warm light in soft amber highlights. To the right of the chef, a younger cook wipes the rim of a second plate with a folded cloth, moving in quick, precise strokes. Several small prep bowls of chopped ingredients, a squeeze bottle of pale sauce, and a folded gray towel sit scattered across the counter. The chef leans in closely over the plate, adjusts one element with metal tweezers, and straightens up slowly, steam still drifting between him and the hanging copper pans.', 'camera_movement_description': 'Starting from a medium shot at eye level, the camera dollies in slowly toward the plate on the counter, easing into a medium close up; the push-in is smooth and continuous, ending with a slight downward tilt that holds the finished dish in the lower center of the frame.'}
wlong_kitchen.kind: W3 long, interior action (chef plating, white apron, copper pans, steam); flip: green herb garnish -> red chili garnish
wlong_kitchen.check: garnish stays GREEN, apron stays WHITE, copper pans keep their warm metal tone (no color bleed)

wlong_harbor.caption: {'scene_content_description': 'Soft morning light spreads across a working harbor where a yellow fishing boat rides gently at its mooring near the center of the scene, the yellow hull rocking slowly on low ripples that spread outward in overlapping rings. A cluster of round red buoys floats in a loose line to the left of the boat, each red float bobbing in turn as the swell passes beneath them. Several gulls wheel lazily overhead while two more stand on the wheelhouse roof of the boat, and one drops down in a slow glide to skim just above the water. Along the far edge of the harbor, a row of tall cranes rises against a pale sky, their long arms angled over stacked shipping containers. The wet stone quay in the foreground holds coiled ropes, a stack of weathered crates, and a folded net, and faint reflections of the yellow boat and the red buoys shimmer and break apart on the moving water. Thin haze softens the distant cranes, and the whole harbor reads as calm, cool, and quiet in the early light.', 'camera_movement_description': 'From a slightly elevated position on the quay, the camera holds a wide shot at a gentle high angle and remains essentially static throughout, with only a barely perceptible handheld drift; no pan, tilt, or zoom occurs.'}
wlong_harbor.edit: {'scene_content_description': 'Soft morning light spreads across a working harbor where a green fishing boat rides gently at its mooring near the center of the scene, the green hull rocking slowly on low ripples that spread outward in overlapping rings. A cluster of round red buoys floats in a loose line to the left of the boat, each red float bobbing in turn as the swell passes beneath them. Several gulls wheel lazily overhead while two more stand on the wheelhouse roof of the boat, and one drops down in a slow glide to skim just above the water. Thin haze softens the distant cranes, and the whole harbor reads as calm, cool, and quiet in the early light.', 'camera_movement_description': 'From a slightly elevated position on the quay, the camera holds a wide shot at a gentle high angle and remains essentially static throughout, with only a barely perceptible handheld drift; no pan, tilt, or zoom occurs.'}
wlong_harbor.kind: W3 long, bound attributes on paired harbor objects (yellow boat + red buoys); flip: yellow boat -> green boat
wlong_harbor.check: boat stays YELLOW, buoys stay RED (no swap/bleed); gulls and cranes present

wlong_park.caption: {'scene_content_description': 'On a sunlit grass field at the edge of a city park, a player in a bright orange jersey dribbles a white ball forward at a quick, controlled pace, tapping it ahead with alternating feet. He cuts sharply to his left around a training cone, keeping the white ball close, then accelerates into open space as the orange jersey flutters against his shoulders. A second player in a plain dark kit jogs in from the right side and shadows him at a distance, mirroring each change of direction without closing in. Behind the field, a line of tall leafy trees sways slightly in a light breeze, their shadows dappling the edge of the pitch, and two joggers move steadily along a paved path beyond the trees, passing behind the goal frame. The low afternoon sun brightens the orange fabric of the jersey and picks out the white ball sharply against the green of the grass. Small divots and worn patches mark the center of the field, and a water bottle and a folded jacket lie near the sideline.', 'camera_movement_description': 'The camera pans smoothly from left to right at eye level, following the player as he advances and keeping him in the left third of a wide shot; the pan decelerates gently as he slows, and the framing stays level and stable without any dolly or zoom movement.'}

wlong_park.kind: W3 long, park sports action (orange jersey + white ball, trees, joggers); flip: orange jersey -> purple jersey
wlong_park.check: jersey stays ORANGE, ball stays WHITE (no swap/bleed); park setting intact

wlong_night.caption: {'scene_content_description': 'A crowded night market fills a narrow street with color and movement, anchored by a glowing neon pink sign that hangs above the nearest stall and washes the counter below it in a strong pink glow. Steam pours steadily from several food carts lined along the left side of the lane, drifting upward through strings of paper lanterns stretched overhead between the buildings. Many shoppers move slowly through the passage in both directions, pausing at stalls, leaning in to inspect trays of skewers and dumplings, and stepping around one another in the tight space. A vendor beneath the neon pink sign flips food on a flat grill with rapid, practiced motions, brief flares of oil lighting his hands, while a short queue forms at his counter. Warm lantern light mixes with the pink neon cast on faces, awnings, and wet patches of pavement, and the signboards of other stalls glow farther down the lane, their letters softening into haze. Bicycles and stacked plastic stools crowd the edges of the walkway, and the whole scene reads as busy and warm against the surrounding darkness.', 'camera_movement_description': 'The camera advances at a slow walking pace in a gentle forward dolly through the lane at eye level, carrying a subtle handheld sway; it holds a medium wide framing on the neon-lit stall ahead and never pans away, tilts, or zooms during the approach.'}

wlong_night.kind: W3 long, night market (neon pink stall sign, steaming carts, lanterns, crowd); flip: pink sign -> blue sign
wlong_night.check: stall sign stays NEON PINK (no hue drift toward blue/white); lanterns stay warm; crowd present
